title: helenium anceps
intro: Helenium anceps, also known as twinflower sneezeweed, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate respiratory issues and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Helenium anceps include its ability to soothe coughs, relieve sinus congestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
